The '''''Trenchant''''' was a [[Sacheen-class light escort|''Sacheen''-class light escort]] of the inaugural [[New Republic Fifth Fleet]], of [[Task Force Copperleaf]]. ''Trenchant'' was the first casualty of the [[Battle of Doornik-319]]. Its [[Ray shield/Legends|shields]] were taken down by four calibrated [[gravity bomb]]s deployed by a [[Yevetha]]n [[Aramadia-class thrustship|''Aramadia''-class thrustship]] which had [[Precision hyperspace jump|microjumped]] near the ''Trenchant''{{'s}} location. The ''Trenchant'' was then destroyed by [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedos]].

*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1st}}
